name: debt-runner-expansion
purpose: L3 deep-research on debt-runner CLI write-side expansion and web dashboard read-side for the TDMS system; produced hybrid-fetch architecture decision.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl despite status=complete. Has claims.jsonl (44 claims), sources.jsonl (53 sources), findings-v1/ + findings/ (v1 and final challenge-revised), challenges-v1/ + challenges/. Produced RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md + DECISIONS_PRE_PLAN.md + SYNERGIES.md. 6 bugs confirmed, 4 challenge rounds, 15 factual corrections applied. metadata.json.completedAt=2026-03-27. Deep-plan consumer hint explicit. Missing from index likely because the index schema was in flux when this session completed.

name: multi-layer-memory
purpose: L1 deep-research on multi-layer memory architecture for Claude Code; 128 claims on user memory, auto-memory, canonical-memory, state schema, and episodic memory.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl despite status=challenge-and-gap-complete. Has claims-analysis.jsonl + claims-landscape.jsonl + claims-recommendations.jsonl in addition to claims.jsonl — multi-file claims pattern. 40 agents deployed, 4 failed and respawned. crossModel unavailable. debtCandidates: canonical-memory divergence, STATE_SCHEMA.md 8x stale, episodic-memory show permission blocked, governance-changes.jsonl missing. High portability value: memory architecture findings apply to any Claude Code project.

name: research-discovery-standard
purpose: L1 deep-research defining the research and discovery standard methodology; 10 sub-questions, 5 waves, 18 agents, 14 findings files.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl. Has BRAINSTORM.md + RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md + AUDIT.md + metadata.json. metadata.json date=2026-03-24. The methodology defined here IS the deep-research skill framework. Also contains .research/research-discovery-standard/BRAINSTORM.md — unusual to have a BRAINSTORM.md inside a research session. Highly portable — the standard itself is project-agnostic. Consumer hint = deep-plan.

name: research-discovery-standard-v2
purpose: L1 supplemental gaps research on the research-discovery-standard (v2); 8 sub-questions covering state machine, auto-advance, schema versioning, dashboard design, scouting governance, and CL integration.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl. metadata.json date=2026-04-04. 77 claims, 63 sources, 8 findings files. Has RESUME.md (compaction-resilient state) + AUDIT.md. relates_to prior research at .research/research-discovery-standard/ and .planning/research-discovery-standard/DECISIONS.md. 5 contradictions identified. 52 deep-plan candidates. relates_to.brainstorm reference points to research-discovery-standard/BRAINSTORM.md (cross-session reference).

name: website-analysis
purpose: L1 deep-research on Website Analysis Skill design; 175 claims across 22 sub-questions covering extraction pipelines, Creator View, compliance, link scoring, Expedition Mode, and storage architecture.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl despite explicit consumerHints.readyForDeepPlan=true. metadata.json completedAt=2026-04-05. 39 agents: 22 searchers + 1 synthesizer + 9 verifiers + 2 contrarian + 2 OTB + 4 gap pursuers + 1 final synthesizer. 30 serendipitous findings. selfAuditResult=null (Phases 4-5 pending). Has BRAINSTORM.md. 27 gaps (6 resolved). Portability: creator-context injection and memory.md references are SoNash-specific but the rest of the skill design is portable.

name: t28-intelligence-graph-data-layer
purpose: L1 deep-research on SQLite + FTS5 + better-sqlite3 graph data layer architecture for the T28 Intelligence project; 73 claims on backend selection, schema design, and migration strategy.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl. metadata.json date=2026-04-07, session=267. 39 agents. status=post-challenge. readyForDeepPlan=false — blocked by OQ-16 (Neuromcp audit) and OQ-17 (query-pattern audit). Has synthesis/ subdirectory with 3 synthesis files (S1, S2, S3). Has challenges/. Also has query-pattern-audit.md (partial completion of OQ-17). 5 disqualified tools documented with reasons. Portable elements: SQLite + better-sqlite3 selection logic, M2M tag benchmarks, @huggingface/transformers v4 note.

name: jason-os
purpose: Brainstorm session establishing JASON-OS as a portable Claude Code OS; explored 6 directions (A–F), chose B→F (Template → Platform). Includes 2026-04-03 revisit adding Domain 02a (External Adoption Scouting).
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl. Only file: BRAINSTORM.md. No metadata.json. session_type=brainstorm. Date=2026-04-01, revisited 2026-04-03. Status=Complete, routing=deep-plan. Critical for cross-reference: this is SoNash's formal ideation origin for JASON-OS itself. Identifies ~47 portable skills, ~16 generic agents, ~5 portable hooks, ~5 library scripts as candidates. Anti-goals: no SoNash-specific refs, no developer-only tool. Direction B→F chosen. Open Question 1 = sync mechanisms = the very topic being researched now (sync-mechanism branch). operator clarification: 'won't all port over and many will most likely be simplified'. Decision 33 added Domain 02a (External Adoption Scouting) as ongoing Tier 1 domain.

name: content-analysis-system
purpose: Brainstorm session for T29 Unified Content Analysis System (/analyze + /recall commands); content-type router unifying repo, website, media, and document handlers under one interface.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl. Only file: BRAINSTORM.md. No metadata.json, no findings/, no claims.jsonl. Brainstorm only — no research phase yet. Date=2026-04-08, Session #269. Routing=deep-plan. Key anti-goal: 'Don't let infrastructure eat the project (learned from T28 data layer detour)'. Stub status = brainstorm complete but research not started. 7 open questions for deep-plan.

name: repo-analysis
purpose: Active T28 pre-brainstorm repo-analysis corpus; systematic analysis of 28+ repos across 6 clusters to inform T28 Unified Content Intelligence brainstorm. Parallel workflow with gap agents per cluster.
notes: Not in research-index.jsonl. No metadata.json. Not a research session in the deep-research sense — it is a pre-brainstorm repo corpus built using /repo-analysis and /website-analysis skills. Files: _T28-analysis-plan.md (session #267-era workflow), _gap-agent-A/B/C/EF.md (cluster gap reports), _workflow-phase-a.md (Phase A inline gap fixes). Not classifiable as session_type deep-research — it is a hybrid working directory. Portability=not-portable (SoNash T28 project-specific). Distinct from .research/archive/repo-analysis-skill/ which IS indexed.

name: research-index.jsonl
purpose: Master index of completed research sessions; 11 records with topicSlug, depth, domain, claimCount, sourceCount, confidenceDistribution, outputPath, and status fields.
notes: 11 lines as of 2026-04-18. Two schema variants present: early records use topicSlug/claimCount/sourceCount; later records use slug/claims/sources/tags. Schema drift within the same file. 4 archived sessions + 7 current sessions indexed. Does NOT cover 9 current un-indexed sessions. Last record = file-registry-portability-graph (2026-04-17).

name: EXTRACTIONS.md
purpose: Auto-generated aggregated extraction candidates across all analyzed sources in the analysis/ corpus; rebuilt by scripts/cas/generate-extractions-md.js from extraction-journal.jsonl.
notes: 674 lines. Auto-generated — do not edit. Covers 20+ sources including repos, websites, documents, and YouTube videos. Sections per source slug. Companion to extraction-journal.jsonl (append-only source) and content-analysis.db (SQLite backend). Last modified 2026-04-18.

name: extraction-journal.jsonl
purpose: Append-only journal of all extraction candidates across every analyzed source; 379 lines covering repos, websites, documents, and YouTube. Primary write-side for the T28/T29 knowledge pipeline.
notes: 379 records as of 2026-04-18. Append-only (never edit entries). Consumed by generate-extractions-md.js to build EXTRACTIONS.md and by content-analysis.db sync. Schema has 'source' field mapped to .research/analysis/ slugs via source-slug-map.json.

name: knowledge.sqlite
purpose: SQLite database for structured knowledge storage; likely the T28 graph data layer prototype or the dev-dashboard knowledge backend. 400KB as of 2026-04-17.
notes: 400KB (409600 bytes). Binary — no schema visible without sqlite3 CLI. gitignore status unclear. runtime_scope=machine. Not portable across machines without export. Should be .gitignored per T28 debt candidate 'Add .research/*.db entries to .gitignore'. source_scope=project, runtime_scope=machine.

name: content-analysis.db
purpose: SQLite database for content analysis records; backend for the T29 content analysis system. 424KB with active WAL journal.
notes: 424KB (434176 bytes) + 32KB shm + 0-byte wal (WAL mode active). Companion: content-analysis.db-shm, content-analysis.db-wal. Last modified 2026-04-18. Binary — not portable. Should be .gitignored. Distinct from knowledge.sqlite — this is specifically the CAS (Content Analysis System) backend. source_scope=project, runtime_scope=machine.

name: source-slug-map.json
purpose: Maps extraction-journal.jsonl 'source' field values (GitHub owner/repo format or URLs) to .research/analysis/ directory slugs; required for T28 migration script.
notes: Created 2026-04-08, session #269. Two sections: 'repos' (13 entries) and 'websites' (5 entries). derivable_rule documented: lowercase + replace '/' with '-'. 4/13 repo slugs follow the rule; 9 are irregular and manually mapped. Required before migration script can run per OQ-5.

name: tag-vocabulary.json
purpose: Controlled vocabulary for tags applied to analysis records and extraction journal entries; 1141 lines covering multiple categories with schema versioning.
notes: schema_version=1, last_updated=2026-04-18. 1141 lines. References CONVENTIONS.md §14 for rules. Portable in principle (tag ontology is project-agnostic) but may contain SoNash-specific domain tags. Companion reference: .claude/skills/shared/CONVENTIONS.md §14.

name: analysis-corpus
purpose: T29 repo-analysis and website-analysis output corpus; 30+ source analyses (repo + website + document types) organized by slug, with synthesis/, audit artifacts, and T29 audit meta-files.
notes: Not a research session — a /repo-analysis and /website-analysis output corpus. Contains per-source subdirs (docling/, unstructured/, youtube-oszdfnqmgrw/, etc.) each with analysis.json, content-eval.jsonl, coverage-audit.jsonl, creator-view.md, deep-read.md, and optionally history/. Also contains: synthesis/ and v1-synthesis/ subdirs. Meta-files: _audit-report.md (T29 Step 10.5 audit, 31/34 sources: 11 PASS / 20 FAIL), _audit-fixes.md (remediation proposals), _quick-scan-upgrade.md (12 true quick-scan repos upgrade checklist). 65% failure rate on T29 audit = active debt.
